# Pull Request

## What & why
<!-- What does this change and why? Link related issues. -->

## Type
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore/CI

## Checklist
- [ ] Ran tests locally (`pytest test_deepseek_brain.py test_rbac_privilege_escalation.py -q` at minimum).
- [ ] No secrets committed (no `.env`, API keys, wallet/private keys, tokens).
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant.
- [ ] One logical change; unrelated refactors excluded.
- [ ] CodeQL/Dependabot findings addressed (no new High/Critical).
